title: 0/1 Knapsack
description: Line 1: capacity. Line 2: space-separated item weights. Line 3: space-separated item values (same order). Print the maximum total value that fits without exceeding capacity; each item may be used at most once.

examples.explanation: The most valuable set of items that fits the capacity is worth 220.
The most valuable set of items that fits the capacity is worth 90.
